summary.what: Migrate to beads 0.59 hash-derived ports: clear hardcoded port 3308, update hooks, patch gitignore, pull from dolt remote
summary.why: bd 0.59 replaces hardcoded port 3307 with hash-derived ports — hardcoded overrides defeat the collision-prevention mechanism
summary.how: Cleared dolt_server_port from metadata.json, removed dolt.port from config.yaml, bd dolt start assigns 13517, bd hooks install --force, added dolt-monitor.pid.lock to gitignore, bd dolt commit && bd dolt pull
